mapper.sql: CASE WHEN UPPER(p.status) IN ('CANCELED', 'CANCELLED') THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE UPPER(p.status) END
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.schedule_id AS scheduleId, AS status, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM participation p WHERE p.id = #{participationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.schedule_id AS scheduleId, AS status, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM participation p INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND p.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO participation ( user_id, schedule_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{scheduleId}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.sql: s.id AS schedule_id, p.id AS participation_id, s.category AS category, s.title AS title, COALESCE(s.region, '') AS location, si.image_url AS thumbnail, s.start_date AS start_date, s.end_date AS end_date, s.current_participants AS current_people, s.max_participants AS max_people, p.status AS db_status, CASE WHEN s.user_id = u.id THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS host
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM participation p INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id INNER JOIN schedule s ON s.id = p.schedule_id LEFT JOIN schedule_image si ON si.schedule_id = s.id AND si.is_thumbnail = 1 WHERE u.email = #{email} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND IN
#{status}
ORDER BY s.start_date ASC, p.id DESC

SELECT s.id AS schedule_id, NULL AS participation_id, s.category AS category, s.title AS title, COALESCE(s.region, '') AS location, si.image_url AS thumbnail, s.start_date AS start_date, s.end_date AS end_date, s.current_participants AS current_people, s.max_participants AS max_people, s.status AS db_status, TRUE AS host FROM schedule s INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN schedule_image si ON si.schedule_id = s.id AND si.is_thumbnail = 1 WHERE u.email = #{email} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.start_date ASC, s.id DESC
